surface_forms: Son Altesse Monseigneur le duc de Châtellerault

appraisal_events.evidence: Le duc le regarda, le reconnut, se vit perdu, cependant que le domestique ... hurlait ... « Son Altesse Monseigneur le duc de Châtellerault ! »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator stages a public exposure of Châtellerault’s identity by the huissier’s emphatic announcement, which the duke experiences as a loss (‘se vit perdu’).

status_effects.explanation: He is locally compromised by the conspicuous revelation of his full title when he wished to keep a lower profile, which he feels as a social defeat.
